summary: Iteration 34: Tested new Reports feature + Dashboard button reordering. All backend tests pass (14/14). Frontend UI verified via Playwright - all features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/establishments/me/reports requires authentication (returns 401)
Backend: GET /api/establishments/me/reports returns 200 for authenticated establishment
Backend: Reports response has all 4 sections (credits_received, qr_codes_read, top_offers, sales_summary)
Backend: credits_received section has total_credits, total_cash, sales list
Backend: qr_codes_read section has total count and sales list
Backend: top_offers section has offer_id, offer_title, count, percentage
Backend: sales_summary section has total_revenue, total_transactions, ticket_medio, first_sale, last_sale
Backend: Reports with date filter (today) returns 200
Backend: Reports with date filter (7 days) returns 200
Backend: Reports with date filter (30 days) returns 200
Backend: Reports with date filter (90 days) returns 200
Backend: Reports without date filter (all time) returns 200
Backend: Health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend: Establishment login works correctly
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Ações Rápidas' section
Frontend: Button order is correct: 1.Criar Ofertas, 2.Validar QR, 3.Equipe, 4.Relatório Financeiro, 5.Meu Perfil
Frontend: 'Relatório Financeiro' button has bar-chart icon (graph)
Frontend: 'Relatório Financeiro' button has subtitle 'Vendas, créditos e desempenho'
Frontend: Clicking 'Relatório Financeiro' navigates to /establishment/reports
Frontend: Reports page header shows 'Relatório Financeiro'
Frontend: Reports page has date presets: Hoje, 7 dias, 30 dias, 90 dias, Tudo
Frontend: Reports page has 4 tabs: Créditos, QR Codes, Top Ofertas, Resumo
Frontend: Créditos tab shows Total Recebido em Créditos, Pago em dinheiro/cartão, Total geral
Frontend: Créditos tab shows DETALHAMENTO with sales list
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 complete. New Reports feature fully tested. Dashboard 'Ações Rápidas' button order verified: 1.Criar Ofertas, 2.Validar QR, 3.Equipe, 4.Relatório Financeiro, 5.Meu Perfil. Reports page has 4 tabs (Créditos, QR Codes, Top Ofertas, Resumo) with date filtering (Hoje, 7 dias, 30 dias, 90 dias, Tudo). Backend endpoint GET /api/establishments/me/reports returns credits_received, qr_codes_read, top_offers, sales_summary objects.

features_verified.relatorio_financeiro_button: WORKING - Has bar-chart icon and subtitle 'Vendas, créditos e desempenho'
features_verified.reports_date_presets: WORKING - Hoje, 7 dias, 30 dias, 90 dias, Tudo
features_verified.reports_4_tabs: WORKING - Créditos, QR Codes, Top Ofertas, Resumo
features_verified.credits_tab_content: WORKING - Shows Total Recebido em Créditos (R$ 21,50), Pago em dinheiro/cartão (R$ 460,45), Total geral (R$ 481,95), DETALHAMENTO (15 VENDAS)
features_verified.backend_reports_endpoint: WORKING - Returns all 4 sections with date filtering
